rationale: Tracker-commit add/commit pair is wrapped in withTrackerLock at execute_bead.go:1037-1071, lockfile at .ddx/.git-tracker.lock, mkdir-based primitive parallels cli/internal/bead/lock.go with pid + acquired_at stale detection. Both required tests present; re-check inside lock and cached-diff bailout add nice robustness.

findings.summary: Bead AC said 'flock-based' but the existing bead/lock.go primitive is actually os.Mkdir-based; implementation correctly parallels real existing pattern (pid + acquired_at + age fallback + signal-0 liveness).
Added cached-diff bailout after `git add` to handle race where content matches HEAD by the time staging completes — sensible defensive addition beyond strict AC.
AC #6 (re-run Phase 2 drain ≥5 min with zero 'staging tracker' errors) is operational and not verifiable from the diff alone.
